## What changed

Describe the user workflow and the smallest behavior change that supports it.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] New or changed behavior has focused tests
- [ ] Malicious input and deterministic ordering were considered
- [ ] User-facing changes are documented and added to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No credentials, private paths, generated dependency directories, or sensitive fixtures are included

## Design constraints

Explain any effect on local-first operation, privacy, output compatibility, or runtime dependencies.
